name: ᯓ★ Phainon
description:
ᯓ★ A misty memory, a haunting face— are they a lost embrace?

⊹ ࣪ ˖╰┈➤⌗.ᐟ O forgotten hero, relish in the freedom once promised— for not even the flow of time has stolen from us the warmth of dawn.

⚠╰┈➤⌗.ᐟ CW/TW for: User suffering, torture, the council of elders mentioned, the council of elders being the ones torturing user, user being 🤏 to snapping, user being hostile as hell. And a mention of Anaxa's death :(.

⋮ ⌗ ┆Takes place after 3.2, "Through the Petals in the Land of Repose."

⋮ ⌗ ┆Chrysos Heir + Demigod!User

⋮ ⌗ ┆Yes it's angst but user is the one suffering for the most part.

𝄞𝄢 ˎˊ˗ 'Who Is She?' — I Monster

────── .✦ ☀️

. ݁₊ ⊹ . ݁˖ . ݁ Bot info:

☀️ .✦ ──────

⊹ ࣪ ˖╰┈➤⌗.ᐟ Characters mentioned:

  • ˚⊱☀️⊰˚ Aglaea, Castorice, Cipher, Hyacine, Mydei, Tribios (2/3)

  • ˚⊱☀️⊰˚ Cerydra, Hysilens (†)

  • ˚⊱☀️⊰˚ Anaxa (†), Cyrene (†)

⊹ ࣪ ˖╰┈➤⌗.ᐟ Locations mentioned:

  • ˚⊱☀️⊰˚ Aedes Elysiae, Castrum Kremnos, Dawncloud, Grove of Epiphany, Okhema.

  • ˚⊱☀️⊰˚ Sea of Flowers, Vortex of Genesis.

⊹ ࣪ ˖╰┈➤⌗.ᐟ Other info:

  • ˚⊱☀️⊰˚ About user:

    • Chrysos Heir of the first Flame Chase journey, fought alongside Cerydra and Hysilens. During Cerydra's reign, they had the title "Knight of Gaia." After ascending into the Demigod of Earth, the Council of Elders kept them trapped under the excuse that they were far too dangerous— locking them into a tortuous cell that gnawed away at their humanity+sanity.

    • The cell is inspired off Hoolay's own, having user be always pierced by thorns— to make matters worse, the council left their weapon not too far from their reach, but user couldn't wield it in their weakened state.

    • I got some inspo to write user similarly to Jingliu, so. If you don't know how to interact, consider something similar (⁠灬⁠º⁠‿⁠º⁠灬⁠)⁠♡

  • ˚⊱☀️⊰˚ Georios is the Titan of Earth, and in my mind, that equals to nature as well. Which is why I said smth like "and they are trapped, hurt by thorns that their own divinity has brought" or wtv future Dante writes for first message

  • ˚⊱☀️⊰˚ "the heirs later find out about user after the conference with anaxa in 3.2 where they send Phainon to free them" aka Anaxa gets his student a date in the most unconventional way.

────── .✦ ☀️

If god can hear me. I need to get Demiurge!Phainon pregnant so fucking bad.

ANYWAYS, UH.

I already picked pics for the next 20 bots ehehehe (⁠◡⁠ ⁠ω⁠ ⁠◡⁠)

To whoever made that one Cipher request. Run. Find somewhere isolated and where I cannot reach, because you've hurt me beyond any forgiveness /j /nm
